mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-order-cancel-sql-oracle.xml - selectOutboundHeaderInfo - 릴리즈코드 정보 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY ,OH.OWKEY ,OH.OBHDKEY ,OH.OBSTATUSCD ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(WH.WAWKSTATUSCD, '00') IN ('30', '40', '50', '60') THEN 'N' WHEN COALESCE(WH.CLASSIFPLANSNDYN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS CNCLYN ,OH.WAHDKEY ,OH.OBHDTYPECD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH ON OH.CTKEY = WH.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WH.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WH.WAHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey}
